title: Flea Treatment in Massapequa | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Massapequa, Long Island. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Price range $350 – $650. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Massapequa home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services specifically designed for Long Island properties. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy a flea-free environment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Massapequa and the greater Long Island area for years with specialized flea treatments tailored to local conditions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of flea infestations in suburban homes and use safe, EPA-approved products that protect your family and pets while delivering guaranteed results.
localContext: From the waterfront homes along Massapequa Creek to the family residences near Massapequa Preserve, flea problems can affect any property in this Nassau County community. Our team is familiar with Massapequa's mix of single-family homes, condos near Sunrise Highway, and businesses along Broadway, providing customized flea solutions for every property type in the area.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Massapequa range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue to hatch for several weeks, we typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 14-21 days to eliminate newly emerged fleas and break the reproductive cycle completely.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for both pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, after which the space is completely safe to occupy.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective treatment. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and floors, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily relocating pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide you with a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your Massapequa flea treatment appointment.
